queries.question: Provide a list of all graphic designers and also provide a list of web developers who work at 3/10 New York Avenue.
queries.sql:
SELECT Graphic_Designers.name
FROM Office JOIN Graphic_Designers ON Office.id = Graphic_Designers.officeId
UNION
SELECT Web_Developers.name
FROM Office JOIN Web_Developers ON Office.id = Web_Developers.officeId
WHERE Office.address = "3/10 New York Avenue"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?office a :Office .
    ?graphic_designers a :Graphic_Designers .
    ?graphic_designers p:hasOffice ?office .
    ?graphic_designers p:name ?name .
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?office a :Office .
    ?web_developers a :Web_Developers .
    ?web_developers p:hasOffice ?office .
    ?web_developers p:name ?name .
    ?office p:address ?address_f .
    FILTER(STR(?address_f) = "3/10 New York Avenue")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Show graphic designers and web developers working at 3/10 New York Avenue.
queries.sql:
SELECT Graphic_Designers.name
FROM Office JOIN Graphic_Designers ON Office.id = Graphic_Designers.officeId
WHERE Office.address = "3/10 New York Avenue"
UNION
SELECT Web_Developers.name
FROM Office JOIN Web_Developers ON Office.id = Web_Developers.officeId
WHERE Office.address = "3/10 New York Avenue"
